revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from airport code |name=From an airport code |from=an airport letter code or [[location identifier]], such as [[International Air Transport Association airport code|IATA]] or [[International Civil Aviation Organization airport code|ICAO]], |to=its associated airport article |info=An example is {{-r|AVV}}[[File:Redirect arrow without text.svg|35px]][[Avalon Airport]]. |main category=Redirects from airport codes |printworthy=yes }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{documentation}} </noinclude>

<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from airport code |name=From an airport code |from=an airport letter code or [[location identifier]], such as [[International Air Transport Association airport code|IATA]] or [[International Civil Aviation Organization airport code|ICAO]], |to=its associated airport article |info=An example is {{-r|AVV}}[[File:Redirect arrow without text.svg|35px]][[Avalon Airport]]. |main category=Redirects from airport codes |printworthy=yes }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from airport code |name=From an airport code |from=an airport letter code or [[:en:Location identifier|Location identifier]], such as [[:en:International Air Transport Association airport code|IATA]] or [[:en:International Civil Aviation Organization airport code|ICAO]], |to=its associated airport article |info=An example is {{-r|AVV}}[[File:Redirect arrow without text.svg|35px]][[:en:Avalon Airport|Avalon Airport]]. |main category=Redirects from airport codes |printworthy=yes }}<noinclude>
